title: Automation Hour Option (when date arrives)
excerpt: It would be really great if in the ‘When date arrives’ automation was an hourly option like 1 Hour before date arrives(the time should be ‘read’ automatically if the user has entered the time in the date column)

posts.author: Giannisal (Giannis Alitskolis)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be really great if in the ‘When date arrives’ automation was an hourly option like 1 Hour before date arrives(the time should be ‘read’ automatically if the user has entered the time in the date column)
